notes: Constitution is a BUILT artifact: prompts/constitution.md (source, edited by this integration) -> `make const` installs it to $(RUN_DIR)/CLAUDE.md and restarts the aitrader systemd service. Never edit the run-dir copy directly; always edit the source and let the owner run `make const` to deploy. Landed as STEP 2C (RESOLVE PENDING SYNTHESIS), placed adjacent to but not merged with ccprospect's step 2A, right after step 2B CHECK THE NEWS and before step 3 SURVEY -- same lettered-sub-step precedent ccprospect used (2A, 2B), to avoid renumbering ~25 existing 'step N' cross-references elsewhere in the doc. ask_gpt review (per constitution-edit-protocol) caught and fixed before landing: the vague 'real annotation' requirement replaced with the exact insight_hypothesize schema shape ({ref_id, action: tombstone|downweight|reviewed, reason}); a 'do not manufacture a candidate merely to clear a trigger' anti-filler line added; the TOOL_ERROR fail-open clause widened to cover insight_hypothesize (not just insight_survey/insight_observe) so a failed hypothesize call can't trap the agent retrying forever to force pending_count:0; insight_observe's 'cheap, uncapped' framing softened to 'not a per-cycle quota' to avoid reading as an observation-logging requirement. Three cross-reference touch-points updated for consistency with the new step, same pattern ccprospect's own integration required: the House-fuses outrank line (now lists 2A, 2B, 2C, 5A), the step-order enumeration (now 0,1,2,2A,2B,2C,3,4,5,5A,6,7), and step 6 JOURNAL's reproduce-in-full artifact list (now includes the step-2C table). Backup taken first: prompts/constitution.md.backup-20260713-preccinsight. Deploy (`make const`) is owner-run, not done by this integration -- not live on either agent as of this integration.
